rationale: For a military personnel management system, clarity, authority, and data legibility are paramount. A light theme with stark, high-contrast structural elements (dark sidebars/headers) ensures forms (16 steps) and data grids are easy to read. Inspired by tactical command centers and enterprise HR dashboards. Emphasizes the institutional military feel.

headings.strategy: Used for page titles, section headers, and data visualization numbers. Tracking tight for larger sizes to project authority.

body.strategy: Technical, highly legible font for dense data tables, forms, and micro-copy. Perfect for 'Control Room' density.

spacing_and_layout.details: Dense but structured. 1px solid borders for separation. No soft drop shadows. Sharp or 4px max border-radius.
spacing_and_layout.form_layout: Split layout: Vertical stepper on the left (col-span-1), Active step form on the right (col-span-3).

components.cards: Flat background, 1px border-slate-200, rounded-sm, no shadow. Hover state: slight darkening of border to border-slate-300.
components.buttons: Square or rounded-sm. Primary buttons are emerald-900 with white text. Ghost buttons use slate-600. Add hover:bg-emerald-800.
components.inputs: Shadcn defaults but with rounded-sm, focus:ring-emerald-900. No soft shadows.
components.tables: Dense padding (py-2 px-3), striped rows (bg-slate-50/50), sticky header. Crucial for the large list of personnel.
components.stepper: Vertical timeline style for the 16 steps, with clear 'completed', 'active', and 'pending' states. Use accent color (gold/yellow) for the active step indicator.

login_background.description: Minimalist dark tactical topographic map background.

soldier_placeholder.description: Soldiers in uniform stand at attention with rifles.

icons.strategy: Weight: 'regular' for standard UI, 'fill' for active states.

motion.strategy: Minimalist and precise. No bouncy animations. Snappy transitions.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against emerald-900 background is white. Use slate-700 or darker for body text.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include 'data-testid' in kebab-case (e.g., 'data-testid="submit-member-step-1"').

login.layout: Left side: Dark tactical map background with the institutional logo. Right side: Login form in a clean white container.
login.title: FALINTIL-FDTL: Personal Management System (PMS)

dashboard.footer: FALINTIL-FDTL: Divisão de Comunicação e Sistema de Informação @2026

registration_form.layout: 16 steps. Use a vertical navigation list on the left to show progress. Content on the right.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the UI primarily using Tailwind CSS and Shadcn components. Use purely .js and .jsx files, NOT .tsx.
Ensure the layout supports large tables with horizontal scrolling and sticky headers.
For the 16-step form, implement a robust form state management (e.g., React Hook Form) to handle the massive amount of data.

PDF generation is a critical requirement. Plan to use a library like 'react-to-pdf' or '@react-pdf/renderer' or raw window.print() styling, and ensure the print layout is styled appropriately, hiding sidebar/nav elements and including the institutional logo.
Include the required footer: 'FALINTIL-FDTL: Divisão de Comunicação e Sistema de Informação @2026' on the dashboard and printouts.
DO NOT use Inter or Roboto for headings. Use 'Outfit'. Use 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text.
Build the 3 access levels (Admin, RH, Superior) logic securely.
Implement the age calculation logic (60 anos para reforma automática).
All interactive elements must have a data-testid attribute.
